heading: Two product families. One mission: affordable, dignified hearing care.
intro: InnerScope's hearing-technology IP and brand portfolio reach consumers through OTCHealth, the private operating company that holds the brand rights and operates OTCHealthMart.com as the consumer storefront.

brands.name: HearingAssist
brands.description: Affordable, simple, and straightforward path to better hearing. A direct-to-consumer over-the-counter hearing aid brand sold through Walmart for years, with branded in-store displays placed across more than 750 Walmart locations, and distribution that expanded into CVS, Rite Aid, and Walgreens. Operated today by OTCHealth, the private operating company.

brands.name: iHEAR & iHEAR Matrix
brands.description: Engineered in Silicon Valley. Includes the iHEARtest at-home hearing screener, advanced hearing aids and personal sound amplifiers, and the iHEAR Matrix Rechargeable over-the-counter hearing aids, placed in Walmart's nationwide over-the-counter hearing aid display in 4,218 stores at launch in November 2023. App-based control, remote fitting, and teleaudiology infrastructure originated with InnerScope's 2021 acquisition of iHEAR Medical and continue under OTCHealth's operation today.
